title: Decision by Committee (Ensemble Learning) Process
description: A flowchart illustrating how multiple weak learners (the committee) contribute their individual predictions to a final, aggregated decision, resulting in a more accurate and robust outcome than any single model.
relationships: Training Data is used to train each Weak Learner
Each Weak Learner makes an individual prediction on new data
The Aggregator outputs the Final Prediction based on the majority vote or average
